// <auto-generated />
#nullable enable

namespace TestNs
{
    partial class MyControl
    {
        /// <summary>
        /// Defines the <see cref="Value"/> property.
        /// </summary>
        public static readonly global::Avalonia.StyledProperty<int> ValueProperty =
            global::Avalonia.AvaloniaProperty.Register<global::TestNs.MyControl, int>(nameof(Value), defaultValue: 0, validate: ValidateValue, coerce: CoerceValue);

        public partial int Value
        {
            get => GetValue(ValueProperty);
            set => SetValue(ValueProperty, value);
        }

        private static partial bool ValidateValue(int value);

        private static partial int CoerceValue(global::Avalonia.AvaloniaObject sender, int value);
    }
}
